Name: SwordArtsParam
Description:
Defines Ashes of War, including unique AoW. Determines AoW animation.
Behaviour data remains in BehaviourParam. Unique AoW data is with the weapon and not with other AoW data.

Fields.Name: Sort Group ID
Fields.Description: Sort item type ID. In the sort Item type order, the same ID is displayed together as the same group.

Fields.Name: Speed Type
Fields.Description: Determines which cancel table skill will use

Fields.Name: Use Right Skill
Fields.Description: Use right hand weapon's Skill if this skill is in the left hand

Fields.Name: Hide in Left Hand
Fields.Description: Hide name/icon when left-handed

Fields.Name: Hide in Right Hand
Fields.Description: Hide name/icon when right-handed

Fields.Name: Hide in Both Hand
Fields.Description: Hide name/icon when two-handed

Fields.Name: Enable Sparring Grounds/Visual Codex
Fields.Description: Allows skill to appear in Sparring Grounds/Visual Codex

Fields.Name: Skill Animation ID
Fields.Description: Offset for TAE animation. 0 is a600. To pass to the behavior script to determine which swashbuckler

Fields.Name: Sort ID
Fields.Description: The menu ordering for Weapon Skills

Fields.Name: Text ID
Fields.Description: Text ID for arts description

Fields.Name: FP Consumption - L1
Fields.Description: MP consumed when issuing arts by L1

Fields.Name: FP Consumption - L2
Fields.Description: MP consumed when issuing arts by L2

Fields.Name: FP Consumption - R1
Fields.Description: MP consumed when issuing arts by R1

Fields.Name: FP Consumption - R2
Fields.Description: MP consumed when issuing arts by R2

Fields.Name: Starting Skill - Duchess
Fields.Description: Allows skill from relic to apply to starting weapon for this hero

Fields.Name: Starting Skill - Wylder
Fields.Description: Allows skill from relic to apply to starting weapon for this hero

Fields.Name: Starting Skill - Executor
Fields.Description: Allows skill from relic to apply to starting weapon for this hero

Fields.Name: Starting Skill - Guardian
Fields.Description: Allows skill from relic to apply to starting weapon for this hero

Fields.Name: Starting Skill - Raider
Fields.Description: Allows skill from relic to apply to starting weapon for this hero

Fields.Name: Starting Skill - Revenant
Fields.Description: Allows skill from relic to apply to starting weapon for this hero

Fields.Name: Starting Skill - Ironeye
Fields.Description: Allows skill from relic to apply to starting weapon for this hero

Fields.Name: Starting Skill - Recluse
Fields.Description: Allows skill from relic to apply to starting weapon for this hero

Fields.Name: Default Weapon Affinity
Fields.Description: Default weapon attribute ID. Can be installed even with unopened weapon attributes

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: The icon for this sword art.

Fields.Name: AI Usage Judgment ID
Fields.Description: AI usage judgment ID

Fields.Name: Usability Text ID
Fields.Description: The text ID for the usability description.

Fields.Name: Attack ID
Fields.Description: Used for unused menu power display

Fields.Name: Sparring Grounds Weapon
Fields.Description: Base weapon used for Sparring Grounds

Fields.Name: Appearance Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Event flag that determines if skill will appear in Sparring Grounds/Visual Codex

Fields.Name: Starting Skill - Scholar
Fields.Description: Allows skill from relic to apply to starting weapon for this hero

Fields.Name: Starting Skill - Undertaker
Fields.Description: Allows skill from relic to apply to starting weapon for this hero
